---
title: "The Rev. Canon Arthur Rawson Ashwell"
---

## The Rev. Canon Arthur Rawson Ashwell

**Dates:** (1824-23 October 1879)

### Description

contributor to <i>MP</i> (1867-77) and to the <i>Monthly Paper of Sunday Teaching</i>

### Biography

He married (1854) Elizabeth Fixsen (b. 1822/3). He served from 1870 as principal of Chichester Theological College,  from 1864-76 he was editor of the <i>Literary Churchman</i> and from 1876 of the <i>Church Quarterly Review</i>.

### Letters

- [To Christabel Rose Coleridge,  [15 August 1899]   ](../letters/3418_To_Christabel_Rose_Coleridge.html)
- Letter from December 10, 1896.
- Letter from April 23d [1881]
- Letter from April 6, 1875
- Letter from February 28, 1869
- Letter from Octr 10th [1867]
- Letter from March 27th 1866
- Letter from Feb 17th [1866]    
- Letter from Febry 5th [1866]
- Letter from Febry 19th 1861

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
